title: PreToolUse hooks must not output JSON to stdout on allow — causes hook error messages
summary: A PreToolUse hook that outputs {"decision":"allow"} to stdout on every allowed command causes Claude Code to show 'PreToolUse:[Tool] hook error' for every invocation. Correct contract: exit 0 silently to allow, exit 2 + stderr to block. Also add 2>/dev/null to jq calls to prevent parse error leakage.
rule: PreToolUse allow = exit 0, no stdout. Block = exit 2 + stderr only.
applies_to: All spokes with PreToolUse hook scripts
